overview: A production-grade college discovery and decision platform. Search and browse Indian colleges, explore detailed profiles with placement stats and courses, compare colleges side-by-side, and use the predictor tool to find colleges matching your entrance exam rank.
features: College listing with search and filters by location and fee range
Detailed college profiles with courses, placements, and reviews
Side-by-side college comparison table (up to 3 colleges)
College predictor tool based on exam type and rank (JEE Main, JEE Advanced, NEET)
Fully responsive design for mobile and desktop
